headline: TASK-050 is the live v5.0 frontier after 4.0.1.

current_state.operating_goal: Implement v5.0 Skillful Actor Runtime: turn skills, capabilities, resources, policies, and metrics into live actor assignment and council-reviewed workforce judgment while preserving the Human Recognition Interface as the operator surface.
current_state.next_value_slice: Start TASK-050 by implementing the actor skill packet writer and fixtures so the TASK-049 contract can be produced as a canonical runtime artifact with source_task_id and source_parent_session_id provenance.

primary_frontier_task.title: Implement actor skill packet writer and fixtures

why_now.summary: TASK-050 is the best current frontier because it matches the live post-release goal surface and no stronger truth conflict is active.
reasons: The active release baseline is 4.0.1 and the runtime is now targeting v5.0.
The current operating goal and next value slice both point at skillful actor assignment: skills, capabilities, resources, policies, and review evidence should shape who does the work.

next_action.recommended_action: Start TASK-050: Implement actor skill packet writer and fixtures
next_action.rationale: This is the best open task aligned with the current operating goal and next release frontier.

operator_answers.what_is_happening_now: TASK-050 is the current frontier and the runtime is in implementation-ready.
operator_answers.why_this_state: TASK-050 is the best current frontier because it matches the live post-release goal surface and no stronger truth conflict is active.
operator_answers.what_is_blocked: No critical truth conflict is currently blocking the frontier.
